'''dohayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biaspectual|biaspectual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biaspectual|biaspectual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dohayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dohayithi|dohayithi]] || [[word:dohayiji|dohayiji]] || [[word:dohayishi|dohayishi]] || [[word:dohayiki|dohayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dohayuthuthu|dohayuthuthu]] || [[word:dohayujuju|dohayujuju]] || [[word:dohayushushu|dohayushushu]] || [[word:dohayukuku|dohayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dohayuthu|dohayuthu]] || [[word:dohayuju|dohayuju]] || [[word:dohayushu|dohayushu]] || [[word:dohayuku|dohayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dohayufthuf|dohayufthuf]] || [[word:dohayufjuf|dohayufjuf]] || [[word:dohayufshuf|dohayufshuf]] || [[word:dohayufkuf|dohayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dohayethe|dohayethe]] || [[word:dohayeje|dohayeje]] || [[word:dohayeshe|dohayeshe]] || [[word:dohayeke|dohayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dohayothotho|dohayothotho]] || [[word:dohayojojo|dohayojojo]] || [[word:dohayoshosho|dohayoshosho]] || [[word:dohayokoko|dohayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dohayotho|dohayotho]] || [[word:dohayojo|dohayojo]] || [[word:dohayosho|dohayosho]] || [[word:dohayoko|dohayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dohayofthof|dohayofthof]] || [[word:dohayofjof|dohayofjof]] || [[word:dohayofshof|dohayofshof]] || [[word:dohayofkof|dohayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfthĂŻf|dohayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfjĂŻf|dohayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfshĂŻf|dohayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfkĂŻf|dohayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dohayĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dohayĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dohayĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dohayĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfthĂŻf|dohayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfjĂŻf|dohayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfshĂŻf|dohayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfkĂŻf|dohayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfthĂŻf|dohayĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfjĂŻf|dohayĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfshĂŻf|dohayĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dohayĂŻfkĂŻf|dohayĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dohayĂŠthĂŠ|dohayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dohayĂŠjĂŠ|dohayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dohayĂŠshĂŠ|dohayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dohayĂŠkĂŠ|dohayĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dohayathatha|dohayathatha]] || [[word:dohayajaja|dohayajaja]] || [[word:dohayashasha|dohayashasha]] || [[word:dohayakaka|dohayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dohayatha|dohayatha]] || [[word:dohayaja|dohayaja]] || [[word:dohayasha|dohayasha]] || [[word:dohayaka|dohayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dohayafthaf|dohayafthaf]] || [[word:dohayafjaf|dohayafjaf]] || [[word:dohayafshaf|dohayafshaf]] || [[word:dohayafkaf|dohayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dohayasha|dohayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dohayshĂ«sha|dohayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dohayrosha|dohayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dohaymusha|dohaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dohayasha|dohayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godohaynkshĂ«sha|godohaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godohaynkrosha|godohaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godohaynkmusha|godohaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godohaynkyasha|godohaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dohahayasha|dohahayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dohahayshĂ«sha|dohahayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dohahayrosha|dohahayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dohahaymusha|dohahaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dohahayasha|dohahayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godohahaynkshĂ«sha|godohahaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godohahaynkrosha|godohahaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godohahaynkmusha|godohahaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godohahaynkyasha|godohahaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dehĂŠyasha|dehĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dehĂŠyshĂ«sha|dehĂŠyshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dehĂŠyrosha|dehĂŠyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dehĂŠymusha|dehĂŠymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dehĂŠyasha|dehĂŠyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godehĂŠynkshĂ«sha|godehĂŠynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godehĂŠynkrosha|godehĂŠynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godehĂŠynkmusha|godehĂŠynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godehĂŠynkyasha|godehĂŠynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dohfayasha|dohfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dohfayshĂ«sha|dohfayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dohfayrosha|dohfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dohfaymusha|dohfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dohfayasha|dohfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godohfaynkshĂ«sha|godohfaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godohfaynkrosha|godohfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godohfaynkmusha|godohfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godohfaynkyasha|godohfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
